---
title: "Python"
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@300;400;600;700;900&family=Instrument+Sans:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;0,600;1,400&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<style>
:root{
  --ac:#f59e0b;--bg:#07070b;--surface:#0e0e14;--card:#13131a;--card-h:#18181f;
  --border:rgba(255,255,255,.07);--border-h:rgba(255,255,255,.14);
  --t1:#f0eee8;--t2:#8a8a9a;--t3:#45454f;
  --fn-head:'Outfit',sans-serif;--fn-body:'Instrument Sans',sans-serif;--fn-mono:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;--r:12px;
}
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
body{background:var(--bg)!important;font-family:var(--fn-body);color:var(--t1)}
#quarto-content{padding:0!important;max-width:100%!important}
nav.navbar,footer,.quarto-title-banner{display:none!important}
a{text-decoration:none}
.page{overflow-x:hidden}
.c-hero{min-height:85vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;padding:clamp(5rem,10vw,8rem) clamp(1.5rem,7vw,7rem) clamp(3rem,5vw,4rem);position:relative;overflow:hidden;background:radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 60% at 10% 50%,rgba(245,158,11,.07) 0%,transparent 70%),var(--bg)}
.c-hero::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;background-image:linear-gradient(var(--border) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,var(--border) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:48px 48px;mask-image:radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 80% at 0% 50%,black 0%,transparent 70%)}
.c-kicker{font-family:var(--fn-mono);font-size:.68rem;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ac);margin-bottom:1.5rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem;position:relative;z-index:2}
.c-kicker::before{content:'';width:22px;height:1.5px;background:var(--ac)}
.c-h1{font-family:var(--fn-head)!important;font-size:clamp(3rem,7vw,6rem)!important;font-weight:900!important;line-height:.97!important;color:var(--t1)!important;letter-spacing:-.03em;margin-bottom:.4em!important;max-width:16ch;position:relative;z-index:2}
.hi{color:var(--ac)} .it{font-style:italic;color:var(--t2)}
.c-desc{font-family:var(--fn-body);font-size:clamp(.95rem,1.5vw,1.08rem);color:var(--t2);line-height:1.75;max-width:50ch;margin-bottom:2rem;position:relative;z-index:2}
.c-meta{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.8rem;margin-bottom:2.8rem;position:relative;z-index:2}
.c-chip{font-family:var(--fn-mono);font-size:.64rem;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--t2);background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);border:1px solid var(--border-h);padding:.38rem 1rem;border-radius:100px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.4rem}
.c-chip b{color:var(--ac)}
.c-hero-btns{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.9rem;position:relative;z-index:2}
.btn-ac{font-family:var(--fn-head);font-weight:700;font-size:.9rem;color:#07070b!important;background:var(--ac);padding:.95rem 2.3rem;border-radius:6px;transition:all .22s;box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(245,158,11,.35);display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.4rem}
.btn-ac:hover{filter:brightness(1.1);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.btn-ghost{font-family:var(--fn-head);font-weight:600;font-size:.9rem;color:var(--t2)!important;background:transparent;padding:.95rem 2rem;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid var(--border-h);transition:all .22s}
.btn-ghost:hover{border-color:var(--ac);color:var(--t1)!important}
.s{padding:clamp(3.5rem,7vw,6rem) clamp(1.5rem,7vw,7rem);max-width:1400px;margin:0 auto}
.s-alt{background:var(--surface);border-top:1px solid var(--border);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.s-lbl{font-family:var(--fn-mono);font-size:.66rem;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ac);margin-bottom:.8rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem}
.s-lbl::after{content:'';display:block;height:1px;width:28px;background:var(--ac);opacity:.5}
.s-title{font-family:var(--fn-head)!important;font-size:clamp(1.8rem,3.5vw,2.8rem)!important;font-weight:900!important;color:var(--t1)!important;letter-spacing:-.025em;margin-bottom:.4rem!important;line-height:1.08!important}
.s-title em{font-style:italic;color:var(--ac)}
.s-desc{font-family:var(--fn-body);font-size:.97rem;color:var(--t2);max-width:58ch;line-height:1.72;margin-bottom:2.8rem}
.grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(280px,1fr));gap:1px;background:var(--border);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r);overflow:hidden}
.gc{background:var(--card);padding:1.8rem;transition:background .2s;cursor:default}
.gc:hover{background:var(--card-h)}
.gc-num{font-family:var(--fn-head);font-size:2.5rem;font-weight:900;color:rgba(245,158,11,.1);line-height:1;margin-bottom:.4rem;display:block}
.gc-name{font-family:var(--fn-head);font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--t1);margin-bottom:.5rem}
.gc-desc{font-family:var(--fn-body);font-size:.8rem;color:var(--t2);line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:.8rem}
.pills{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.35rem}
.pill{font-family:var(--fn-mono);font-size:.6rem;color:var(--t3);background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:.18rem .5rem;border-radius:3px;transition:color .2s,border-color .2s}
.gc:hover .pill{color:var(--ac);border-color:rgba(245,158,11,.25)}
.proj-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(260px,1fr));gap:1.2rem}
.pc{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r);padding:1.8rem;transition:all .25s;cursor:default;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.pc:hover{border-color:var(--ac);transform:translateY(-3px)}
.pc::before{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:var(--ac);transform:scaleX(0);transition:transform .35s}
.pc:hover::before{transform:scaleX(1)}
.pc-num{font-family:var(--fn-mono);font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--t3);margin-bottom:.7rem;display:block}
.pc-name{font-family:var(--fn-head);font-size:.98rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--t1);margin-bottom:.5rem;line-height:1.3}
.pc-desc{font-family:var(--fn-body);font-size:.8rem;color:var(--t2);line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:1rem}
.pc-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.35rem}
.pc-tag{font-family:var(--fn-mono);font-size:.6rem;color:var(--ac);background:rgba(245,158,11,.1);border:1px solid rgba(245,158,11,.25);padding:.18rem .5rem;border-radius:3px}
.c-cta{text-align:center;padding:clamp(4rem,8vw,6rem) clamp(1.5rem,7vw,7rem);background:var(--surface);border-top:1px solid var(--border);position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.c-cta::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;background:radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 60% at 50% 100%,rgba(245,158,11,.06) 0%,transparent 70%)}
.cta-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;font-family:var(--fn-mono);font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ac);background:rgba(245,158,11,.1);border:1px solid rgba(245,158,11,.25);padding:.35rem 1rem;border-radius:100px;margin-bottom:1.8rem}
.cta-dot{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--ac);animation:pd 2s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes pd{0%,100%{transform:scale(1)}50%{transform:scale(1.6);opacity:.5}}
.c-cta h2{font-family:var(--fn-head)!important;font-size:clamp(2rem,4.5vw,3.2rem)!important;font-weight:900!important;color:var(--t1)!important;letter-spacing:-.025em;margin:0 auto 1rem!important;max-width:22ch;line-height:1.08!important;position:relative;z-index:1}
.c-cta h2 em{font-style:italic;color:var(--ac)}
.c-cta p{font-family:var(--fn-body);font-size:1rem;color:var(--t2);max-width:46ch;margin:0 auto 2.5rem;line-height:1.7;position:relative;z-index:1}
.cta-btns{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.9rem;justify-content:center;position:relative;z-index:1}
@media(max-width:640px){.c-hero{padding:4rem 1.5rem 2.5rem}.s{padding:3rem 1.5rem}}
</style>

<div class="page">
<section class="c-hero">
  <div class="c-kicker">Track 03 · Python</div>
  <h1 class="c-h1">Python:<br><span class="hi">Scripting</span><br><span class="it">to AI/ML.</span></h1>
  <p class="c-desc">The most versatile language in tech. Start with clean fundamentals, build automation tools, work with real datasets, and write your first machine learning models — all in one structured track.</p>
  <div class="c-meta">
    <span class="c-chip">⏱ Duration <b>10 Weeks</b></span>
    <span class="c-chip">👥 Level <b>Beginner → Advanced</b></span>
    <span class="c-chip">📦 Projects <b>5 Real Projects</b></span>
    <span class="c-chip">🔑 Prereq <b>Git &amp; GitHub</b></span>
  </div>
  <div class="c-hero-btns">
    <a href="/contact.qmd" class="btn-ac">Enroll Now →</a>
    <a href="#curriculum" class="btn-ghost">View Curriculum</a>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="s" id="curriculum">
  <div class="s-lbl">Curriculum</div>
  <h2 class="s-title">10 Weeks of <em>Real Python</em></h2>
  <p class="s-desc">Every week builds directly on the last — from variables to deployed ML models. No random topic jumps.</p>
  <div class="grid">
    <div class="gc"><span class="gc-num">01</span><div class="gc-name">Python Foundations</div><div class="gc-desc">Variables, data types, control flow, functions, and comprehensions. Write clean, idiomatic Python from day one.</div><div class="pills"><span class="pill">Variables</span><span class="pill">Loops</span><span class="pill">Functions</span><span class="pill">List Comprehensions</span></div></div>
    <div class="gc"><span class="gc-num">02</span><div class="gc-name">OOP &amp; Modules</div><div class="gc-desc">Classes, inheritance, dunder methods, and structuring code into reusable modules and packages.</div><div class="pills"><span class="pill">Classes</span><span class="pill">Inheritance</span><span class="pill">__init__</span><span class="pill">Packages</span></div></div>
    <div class="gc"><span class="gc-num">03</span><div class="gc-name">File I/O &amp; Automation</div><div class="gc-desc">Read, write, parse files (CSV, JSON, XML). Automate repetitive tasks — rename files, generate reports, scrape data.</div><div class="pills"><span class="pill">open()</span><span class="pill">CSV/JSON</span><span class="pill">os module</span><span class="pill">Automation</span></div></div>
    <div class="gc"><span class="gc-num">04</span><div class="gc-name">NumPy &amp; Pandas</div><div class="gc-desc">The backbone of data work. Array operations, DataFrames, cleaning messy data, groupby, merging, and aggregation.</div><div class="pills"><span class="pill">NumPy arrays</span><span class="pill">DataFrames</span><span class="pill">groupby</span><span class="pill">Data Cleaning</span></div></div>
    <div class="gc"><span class="gc-num">05</span><div class="gc-name">Data Visualisation</div><div class="gc-desc">Turn raw data into insight. Matplotlib for control, Seaborn for aesthetics, Plotly for interactive charts.</div><div class="pills"><span class="pill">Matplotlib</span><span class="pill">Seaborn</span><span class="pill">Plotly</span><span class="pill">Dashboard basics</span></div></div>
    <div class="gc"><span class="gc-num">06</span><div class="gc-name">APIs &amp; Web Scraping</div><div class="gc-desc">Fetch live data from REST APIs with requests, scrape websites with BeautifulSoup, and handle rate limits gracefully.</div><div class="pills"><span class="pill">requests</span><span class="pill">REST APIs</span><span class="pill">BeautifulSoup</span><span class="pill">JSON parsing</span></div></div>
    <div class="gc"><span class="gc-num">07</span><div class="gc-name">ML Foundations</div><div class="gc-desc">Regression, classification, train/test splits, overfitting, evaluation metrics. Build intuition before touching a neural network.</div><div class="pills"><span class="pill">scikit-learn</span><span class="pill">Linear Regression</span><span class="pill">Classification</span><span class="pill">Cross-validation</span></div></div>
    <div class="gc"><span class="gc-num">08</span><div class="gc-name">ML in Production</div><div class="gc-desc">Save models with joblib, build a simple prediction API with FastAPI, and deploy it on a cloud VM.</div><div class="pills"><span class="pill">joblib</span><span class="pill">FastAPI</span><span class="pill">Model Deployment</span><span class="pill">Docker basics</span></div></div>
  </div>
</div>

<section class="s-alt">
  <div class="s">
    <div class="s-lbl">Projects</div>
    <h2 class="s-title">Five Things You'll <em>Build</em></h2>
    <p class="s-desc">Real projects, real outcomes. Everything goes to GitHub and counts as portfolio work.</p>
    <div class="proj-grid">
      <div class="pc"><span class="pc-num">Project 01</span><div class="pc-name">File Organiser CLI Tool</div><div class="pc-desc">Automate sorting a messy downloads folder — rename, categorise, and log every action. Your first useful script.</div><div class="pc-tags"><span class="pc-tag">os</span><span class="pc-tag">pathlib</span><span class="pc-tag">argparse</span></div></div>
      <div class="pc"><span class="pc-num">Project 02</span><div class="pc-name">News API Dashboard</div><div class="pc-desc">Pull headlines from a live API, filter by topic, and render a clean terminal dashboard with rich.</div><div class="pc-tags"><span class="pc-tag">requests</span><span class="pc-tag">API</span><span class="pc-tag">rich</span></div></div>
      <div class="pc"><span class="pc-num">Project 03</span><div class="pc-name">EDA Report Generator</div><div class="pc-desc">Upload any CSV, get back a full exploratory data analysis report with statistics and charts — automated with Pandas &amp; Matplotlib.</div><div class="pc-tags"><span class="pc-tag">Pandas</span><span class="pc-tag">Matplotlib</span><span class="pc-tag">Seaborn</span></div></div>
      <div class="pc"><span class="pc-num">Project 04</span><div class="pc-name">House Price ML Model</div><div class="pc-desc">Train a regression model on real estate data, tune hyperparameters, evaluate rigorously, and produce a prediction report.</div><div class="pc-tags"><span class="pc-tag">scikit-learn</span><span class="pc-tag">Regression</span><span class="pc-tag">Cross-val</span></div></div>
      <div class="pc"><span class="pc-num">Project 05</span><div class="pc-name">Prediction API (FastAPI)</div><div class="pc-desc">Wrap your ML model in a FastAPI endpoint, write tests with pytest, containerise with Docker, and deploy on AWS EC2.</div><div class="pc-tags"><span class="pc-tag">FastAPI</span><span class="pc-tag">Docker</span><span class="pc-tag">AWS EC2</span></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="c-cta">
  <div class="cta-badge"><span class="cta-dot"></span>Enrolling Now</div>
  <h2>Python opens<br><em>every door.</em></h2>
  <p>Web, data, ML, automation — it's all Python. Start here, and every other course becomes easier.</p>
  <div class="cta-btns">
    <a href="/contact.qmd" class="btn-ac">Book Your First Session →</a>
    <a href="learn.qmd" class="btn-ghost">← All Courses</a>
  </div>
</section>
</div>
```
